Design Library › Video › Blick Intro — Smoke

Blick Intro — Smokev1

MP4 approved 2025-01-01

Purpose

Standard Blick brand intro. Smoke/fluid visual theme — the default brand video for all standard contexts. Fluid motion aligns directly with drilling fluids brand identity.

Audience

Prospective customers, website visitors, presentation audiences.

Scenes

Brand

Font: Proxima Nova
Voice: Expert mate — confident, plain-spoken, field-focused

Next Steps

  • Embed on blick.group homepage as the hero brand video
  • Upload to YouTube as the canonical brand intro
  • Use smoke/fluid motion as the primary visual direction reference for all Hyperframes compositions
Render to MP4
